attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.PRODUCT_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.DELIVERY_METHOD, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.PID_LEAD_TIME_GOAL, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.COMMENTS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.CREATED_BY_USER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL,
 (
 select PRODUCT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL
 minus
 select PRODUCT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PRODUCT_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.PRODUCT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_PID_LT_GOAL)
